calibration_anchor_policy: A calibration anchor is never counted as an independent prediction in that run.
prediction_policy: Non-anchor results are model predictions only given the declared calibration, geometry, and equilibrium equation.
pdg_reference_policy: The pdg dependency is optional; curated provenance-tagged offline fallbacks are used when unavailable or unsupported.
electron_neutrino_policy: Electron-neutrino comparison is an upper-limit comparison unless a vetted central reference is explicitly supplied.
forbidden_claims: calibration anchor counted as an independent prediction
